sections.paragraph:
Νυμφᾶς, ᾶ, ὀ (CIG I, 269, 15; 1240, 18f; prob. a shortened form Νυμφόδωρος; s. Νύμφα) Nymphas Col 4:15 v.l. (as acc. Νυμφᾶν).

CIG CIG = Corpus Inscriptionum Graecarum—List 3

prob. prob. = probable, probably

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

acc. acc. = accusative

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 680
